note: Lead-nurture review queue. Every message is a DRAFT — Carrie approves each one before anything sends. Nothing auto-sends.

leads.interest: buying a first home in the Youngsville area, budget around 250k

steps.intent: Helpful welcome + what to expect working with Carrie; no ask beyond 'reply anytime'.
steps.subject: Welcome — here whenever you're ready
steps.body:
Hi SAMPLE-Buyer,

Thanks so much for reaching out about buying a first home in the Youngsville area, budget around 250k. I wanted to say a warm hello and let you know there's no pressure and no rush on my end — I'm happy to help at whatever pace works for you. When you'd like, just reply and we'll take the next small step together.

Warmly,
Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR® · eXp Realty · Acadiana
337-258-5379

Reply UNSUBSCRIBE or use the unsubscribe link to stop these emails.

[Demo mode — sample draft; Carrie approves before anything sends.]

steps.intent: Short, friendly note offering to set up a saved home search matching the buyer's OWN stated criteria.
steps.body:
Hi SAMPLE-Buyer, it's Carrie Billeaud with eXp Realty. Happy to set up a saved home search matching what you're looking for whenever you're ready — no rush.
Reply STOP to opt out

[Demo mode — sample draft; Carrie approves before anything sends.]

steps.intent: Share a useful local buying resource already on the site (e.g. the free Acadiana Home Guide, USDA zero-down basics, or flood-zone guide) — education, not a pitch.
steps.subject: A resource you might find useful
steps.body:

Warmly,

steps.intent: Gentle check-in: is now still a good time to look, or should Carrie check back later? Easy to say 'not yet'.

A quick, low-key check-in — is now still a good time, or would later be easier? Totally fine to say "not yet," and I'll happily check back down the road.

Warmly,
